title: Duplicate messages sent by Slack node
symptom: The Slack node sends two messages instead of one, despite a single execution showing in the execution tab.
applies_when: Single execution shows in the execution tab
not_this_if: Only one item is passed to the Slack node
root_cause: The Slack node in n8n sends one message for each item it receives. If the previous node passes multiple items to the Slack node, it will result in multiple messages being sent, even if the execution appears as a single run.
fix_steps: Check the output of the node before the Slack node
Ensure that only one item is being passed to the Slack node
Remove any additional items if present
agent_instruction: Verify the input to the Slack node and ensure only one item is passed to it.
